inputs.text: Stunning portrait of a Korean idol woman with honey blonde highlighted fluffy wolf cut, glancing back over her shoulder with a playful mischievous grin, button nose scrunched slightly, sparkling eyes full of energy. Half body waist up, wearing a sharply tailored lavender power suit with structured shoulders. Standing in endless rows of blooming Provence lavender fields at golden hour. Neon magenta and electric blue glow mixing with warm sunset light, casting prismatic reflections across her flawless porcelain skin. Shot on 135mm telephoto lens, background compressed into dreamy purple bokeh. Extremely detailed skin texture, visible pores, cinematic color grading, hyperrealistic SDXL render. Styled dewy makeup, glass skin highlight on cheekbones. No text, no watermarks.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, signature, extra fingers, cartoon, anime, painting
